title: Renewable Energy Grid Integration Bottlenecks In Low- And Middle-Income Countries
summary: Build a verified workflow for identifying where grid infrastructure, regulatory, and financial bottlenecks prevent renewable energy integration in LMICs, linking grid-capacity data, renewable-resource data, and investment-flow data at national and sub-national scale.
why_it_matters: Solar and wind are now the cheapest new electricity sources globally, but LMICs receive only 15 percent of global renewable energy investment. The bottleneck is not resource or cost — it is grid capacity, regulatory frameworks, and financing access. Identifying where the grid can accept more renewables and where it cannot is the prerequisite for unlocking investment.

success_metrics.target: Every bottleneck classification links grid, regulatory, or financial data with methodology.

review_policy.merge_gate: Schema validation, domain review, safety review, replication.
